author: @MrApocalisse

text:
There something genuinely ominous about Morshu, having fallen apart three times in front of someone (the audience?), devolves into this tirade of profuse apology and begging whoever it was he displayed his unstable construction to to not leave him. The sense of urgency expressed in those few seconds is truly wonderous indeed.

All of it isn’t helped of course by that there’s a (minor) jumpscare shortly following Morshu’s plea. 
Is this shadow figure accosting us Morshu after he degenerated into an even more unstable state, his earlier begging being a cry for help to keep the beast away? Or is it a separate entity, and Morshu was urgently warning us to not leave the safe abode of his shop and venture out where we’d be vulnerable to the creature?
